payload.answer: I could not verify or store the article content because the fetch failed with a 404 network error.

entity_resolution.reason: The URL could not be fetched successfully, so there is no reliable article entity to resolve or store as durable source content.

memory_cards.statement: The user asked to remember an article at https://example.com/missing and described it as useful for memory architecture, but the mock fetch returned a 404 network error.

details: No article content was available to commit as durable memory.

repair_options: Retry the URL later if it may be temporary.
Provide the article text or an alternate source.
Confirm whether the URL is correct or if a different archived link should be used.
